description: Caloron sprint tick — poll GitHub, advance DAG, supervise agents
_note: Stage IDs (REGISTER:*) must be replaced with real hashes after running ./register_stages.sh

stages._comment: Load all state from KV in parallel

dag_state._desc: Retrieve a JSON value by key

last_poll._desc: Retrieve a JSON value by key

agents._desc: Retrieve a JSON value by key

stages._desc: Poll GitHub for sprint events since a timestamp
Store a JSON value under a key
Evaluate a sprint DAG from GitHub events
Store a JSON value under a key
Check agent health from heartbeat history
Decide supervisor intervention for unhealthy agents

dag_status._desc: Check if a sprint DAG is complete

stages._desc: Execute DAG and supervisor actions via GitHub API and shell
